bounded_scope: Partially consume repo-recorded Figma node 149:2 without direct Figma work by turning missing Drive setup/provider access into failed archive export states and exposing configurable retention policy/window state.

repo_recorded_figma_handoff_consumed.node_name: Prototype / 19 / Archive provider and retention handoff

changes: Added archive provider readiness helpers that check Drive repository configuration, credential presence, token exchange, and root/index access before successful archive generation.

Updated /api/admin/exports/student-archive so missing Drive credentials or Drive access failures create failed export rows and student_archive_export_provider_unavailable audit events instead of claiming package delivery.
Added configurable archive download-window retention metadata with ARCHIVE_DOWNLOAD_WINDOW_DAYS and ARCHIVE_RETENTION_POLICY_STATUS.
Updated /api/student/archive/readiness to report provider status, retention policy/window state, and expiring-download state without exposing Drive storage identifiers.
Updated the canonical workspace Archive tab to render retention state through data-archive-retention-status.
Expanded archive, workspace, browser-smoke source, and production-workflow source tests.

validation.result: pass; 143 passing tests and 3 expected opt-in local-server skips
pass; static Cloudflare verification passed and live verification blocked only by missing CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
pass; HTTP 200 contained data-archive-retention-status on poll 1 after push

blockers.next_safe_action: Provide a scoped Cloudflare API token or run remote migration/deployment verification manually.

blockers.cause: This slice provider-gates scoped archive manifests; Drive-backed package files or signed-link delivery still needs live Drive credential secrets and follow-up implementation.
blockers.next_safe_action: Configure Google Drive credential secrets, then implement/verify Drive-backed archive package delivery with fake .test accounts only.

blockers.cause: The repo now exposes configurable archive retention defaults, but school retention policy has not been confirmed.
blockers.next_safe_action: Confirm whether the default 14-day archive download window is acceptable before real student archives.
